messages:
## Listening Ports on This Machine

| Port | Service | Notes |
|------|---------|-------|
| **22** | SSH | Externally accessible; primary remote access method |
| **80** | HTTP | Externally accessible; unencrypted web traffic |
| **111** | RPC Portmapper | Associated with NFS; externally accessible |
| **631** | CUPS | Printing service; bound to localhost only |
| **2080** | (custom) | Alternative web interface; bound to localhost only |
| **8787** | (custom) | `clawd` service; bound to 0.0.0.0 |
| **8789** | (custom) | `feishud` service; bound to 0.0.0.0 |
| **6010–6012** | SSH X11 Forwarding | Display forwarding; bound to localhost only |

### Key Takeaways
- **No HTTPS (port 443)** is currently listening — encrypted web traffic is unavailable.
- **Ports 22, 80, and 111** are exposed to all interfaces (0.0.0.0) — these are the main external-facing services.
- Custom services on **8787/8789** are also externally accessible.

| **22** | SSH | Externally accessible; primary remote access method |
| **80** | HTTP | Externally accessible; unencrypted web traffic |

| **631** | CUPS | Printing service; bound to localhost only |
| **2080** | (custom) | Alternative web interface; bound to localhost only |
| **8787** | (custom) | `clawd` service; bound to 0.0.0.0 |
| **8789** | (custom) | `feishud` service; bound to 0.0.0.0 |
| **6010–6012** | SSH X11 Forwarding | Display forwarding; bound to localhost only |

### Key Takeaways
